title: Proteomics in Inherited Metabolic Disorders.
author: Chantada-Vazquez MDP Bravo SB Barbosa-Gouveia S Alvarez JV Couce ML
content: S-EPMC9740208 PMC9740208 Proteomics in Inherited Metabolic Disorders. Inherited metabolic disorders (IMD) are rare medical conditions caused by genetic defects that interfere with the body's metabolism.
